project:
  type: website
  output-dir: _site

website:
  title: "Your Name | Portfolio"
  navbar:
    left:
      - href: index.qmd
        text: Home
      - href: projects/index.qmd
        text: Projects
      - href: blog/index.qmd
        text: Blog
      - href: about/index.qmd
        text: About
  page-footer:
    center: "© 2025 Your Name. All rights reserved."

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo  # You can change this to other themes like lux, zephyr, etc.
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
